definition: An order block that has been violated (price traded through it) and now acts as support/resistance from the OPPOSITE direction. A bullish OB becomes a bearish breaker when broken below, and vice versa. Breakers signal institutional order flow reversal — the smart money that created the OB has been stopped out, and the opposite side now controls.
depends_on: order_blocks (breaker IS a failed/violated order block)
market_structure (CHoCH creates breakers — the violated OB becomes the breaker)
liquidity_sweep (the sweep that broke the OB confirms the reversal)
feeds_into: entry_models (breaker block is a high-quality entry zone for reversals)
draw_on_liquidity (breaker provides a DOL reference for re-entry)
related_to: rejection_blocks (rejection at breaker confirms it's holding)

bullish_breaker.step_1: Bearish order block forms (last up-candle before a down-move)
bullish_breaker.step_2: Price trades THROUGH the bearish OB, violating it (higher high made)
bullish_breaker.step_3: The violated bearish OB now becomes a BULLISH breaker
bullish_breaker.step_4: When price retraces back to this zone, it acts as SUPPORT
bullish_breaker.entry: Buy at the breaker block zone (old bearish OB), SL below breaker low

bearish_breaker.step_1: Bullish order block forms (last down-candle before an up-move)
bearish_breaker.step_2: Price trades THROUGH the bullish OB, violating it (lower low made)
bearish_breaker.step_3: The violated bullish OB now becomes a BEARISH breaker
bearish_breaker.step_4: When price retraces back to this zone, it acts as RESISTANCE
bearish_breaker.entry: Sell at the breaker block zone (old bullish OB), SL above breaker high

vs_order_blocks.order_block: Holds — price respects it and reverses at the zone. Continuation signal.
vs_order_blocks.breaker_block: Failed OB — price broke through it. Now acts from opposite direction. Reversal signal.
vs_order_blocks.key_difference: OBs confirm trend continuation. Breakers confirm trend REVERSAL.
vs_order_blocks.detection: If an OB is violated (price closes beyond it), mark it as a breaker with flipped polarity

high_quality_breaker: Formed by a CHoCH event (not just a wick through)
Displacement candle broke through the OB (3+ ATR move)
FVG created when the OB was broken (confirms institutional force)
First test of the breaker after formation (virgin breaker)
low_quality_breaker: OB broken by a slow grind (no displacement)
Multiple tests already (breaker is losing potency)
No FVG associated with the break

scoring.virgin_breaker_with_fvg: +8 to ICT score (highest quality reversal zone)
scoring.retested_breaker: +3 to ICT score (still valid but weaker)

common_mistakes: Confusing a breaker with a regular OB — the polarity is FLIPPED
Trading breakers against HTF trend — breakers work best WITH the HTF direction
Not waiting for the retest — entering immediately after formation is premature
Ignoring that breakers expire — after 2-3 tests, the zone is consumed

bridge_integration.detection: When an OB is violated (price closes beyond OB high/low), convert it to a breaker with flipped direction
bridge_integration.entry_zone: Use breaker zone (CE of breaker preferred) as limit entry
bridge_integration.score_impact: Active breaker at entry = +5 to +8 based on quality
bridge_integration.replaces: Breaker supersedes the original OB — remove the old OB from active zones
